interview_answers.scope_mvp: Core dual-mode + auto-detection de localhost ports + documenta follow-up para design mode + reload-on-save
interview_answers.spike: Yes, 20-30min spike for Tauri secondary WebView in Linux WebKitGTK

events.reason: User asked for 'propuesta contundente' — full chain: discovery + iprev 3 rounds + reviewers

events.areas: capabilities inconsistency, dual-state history, URL scheme validation, session-switch wiring, fallback dead end, bbox scroll sync, double-mount guard, port flap debounce, missing tests, Cmd+L scope, spike cleanup, devtools gating

events.polish_absorbed: tokio::sync::Mutex spec + dock placeholder during floating mode

events.reason: Visual validation revealed two BLOQUEANTE issues with Tauri secondary WebView in WebKitGTK: (1) focus capture broke ALL cluihud shortcuts (Cmd+K, alt+nav, ctrl+shift+0); (2) z-order placed webview above React modals/palette/dropdowns. iframe approach avoids both natively.
events.scope_change: REDUCTION — files_estimate 11 → 9, risk_tier medium → low, removed unstable feature dependency, removed secondary webview backend, removed bbox sync, removed design-mode follow-up entirely
events.iprev_re_run: skipped — pivot is scope reduction with cleaner architecture; user reviewed in real-time and approved
